recipe.solutionCode:
student = input()
count = int(input())

total = 0
highest = 0

for i in range(count):
    score = int(input())
    total = total + score
    if score > highest:
        highest = score

average = total / count

print(f"Student: {student}")
print(f"Scores entered: {count}")
print(f"Highest score: {highest}")
print(f"Average: {average:.1f}")

if average >= 90:
    print("Status: excellent")
elif average >= 70:
    print("Status: passing")
else:
    print("Status: needs practice")

sourceChecks.message: Use print(...) to show the required result.
Read the needed value with input() instead of hard-coding the answer.
Use a for loop for this exercise.
Use range(...) to control the counting pattern.
Use an if statement to choose the correct output.
Use elif for the middle case in this exercise.
Include an else branch for the remaining case.
Convert the input to an integer before doing the number work.
Use an f-string to build the formatted text.
Use the variable name `student` in your solution.
